data.title: Velo3D Delivers Better-Than-Expected Q4 Results, Enters 2026 With 'Tremendous' Momentum
data.description: Velo3D Inc's (NASDAQ: VELO) latest fourth-quarter financial report showcased an impressive performance with revenue of $9.44 million, surpassing analyst projections of $8.68 million. The company also exceeded expectations for earnings, reporting an adjusted loss of 54 cents per share compared to an estimated loss of 56 cents per share. Despite a 5% decrease in revenue from 3D printers and parts sales year-over-year due to factors such as product mix and system sales volume, Velo3D remains optimistic about the future. The market responded positively to the news, leading to a surge in VELO stock prices. For more details, visit the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Sight Machine Named to Fast Company's List of the World's Most Innovative Companies of 2026
data.description: Sight Machine Inc., a top industrial AI platform, has been honored for its innovation in manufacturing by being included in the list of the World's Most Innovative Companies of 2026 by Fast Company. The company, based in San Francisco, was recognized for its cutting-edge technology. The announcement was made on March 24, 2026, through PRNewswire. This demonstrates the company’s position as a leader in the industry.

data.title: EnerSys to Participate in Jefferies Fireside Chat
data.description: EnerSys, a prominent player in stored energy solutions for industrial needs, disclosed that its President and CEO, Shawn O’Connell, and Executive Vice President and CFO, Andrea Funk, are set to engage in a fireside discussion led by Jefferies Power, Utilities, & Clean Energy Analyst, Julien Dumoulin-Smith, on Thursday, March 26th, at 2:00 pm ET. This event will be available for live viewing and later replay through a provided link. EnerSys is listed on NYSE as ENS.

data.title: HELP USA, Camber Property Group & NYC Department of Social Services Open First-of-Its-Kind Intake Center for Women Entering the Homeless Shelter System
data.description: In Brooklyn, New York, HELP USA, Camber Property Group, and the New York City Department of Social Services celebrated the unveiling of the HELP Women’s Center (HWC) at 114 Snediker Avenue in East New York. This new facility spans five stories, covering 60,000 square feet and accommodating 200 beds. Starting its services on March 30, 2026, the center will operate as an intake and assessment hub for women initiating their journey into the homeless shelter network. It is notably the city's inaugural site crafted exclusively for this function, bringing forth a new approach to assisting women in need.

data.title: Levi Strauss & Co. To Webcast First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: Levi Strauss & Co. (NYSE: LEVI) is set to hold a conference call on April 7, 2026, at 2 p.m. PT / 5 p.m. ET to discuss its first quarter financial results ending on March 1, 2026. The call will feature Michelle Gass, the president and CEO, and Harmit Singh, the chief financial and growth officer. To participate, registration is required via a provided link.

data.title: Farmers & Merchants Bancorp, Inc. Declares 2026 First-Quarter Cash Dividend
data.description: The quarterly dividend has been raised by 4.0% compared to the previous year, now standing at $0.23 per share.

data.title: Li Bang International Announces 1-for-100 Reverse Share Split
data.description: Li Bang International Corporation Inc., a leading provider of stainless steel commercial kitchen equipment in China, has revealed plans to conduct a reverse share split on a 1-for-100 basis for its ordinary shares. Traded on the Nasdaq under the symbol "LBGJ" (CUSIP: G5480M110), the Company's Class A ordinary shares will be available for trading post-split starting March 27, 2026. This move aims to streamline and enhance the company's market position and capital structure.

data.title: InterDigital Declares Regular Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: InterDigital, Inc., a tech research and development company based in Wilmington, Delaware, disclosed on March 24, 2026, that its Board of Directors approved a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.70 per share for shareholders holding Nasdaq-listed IDCC stock. This dividend is planned for disbursement around April 22, 2026, to shareholders marked as of April 8, 2026.

data.title: Dycom Industries, Inc. Appoints Raejeanne Skillern to Board of Directors
data.description: On March 24, 2026, Dycom Industries, Inc. (NYSE: DY) based in West Palm Beach, Florida, appointed Raejeanne Skillern to its Board of Directors. This decision is effective immediately, with Skillern joining the board on the mentioned date.

data.title: American Airlines elects Mary Dillon to its board of directors
data.description: Today, in Fort Worth, Texas, American Airlines Group Inc. (NASDAQ: AAL) disclosed that Mary Dillon has been appointed to the board of directors. She will be part of the board's Compensation Committee as well as the Corporate Governance and Public Responsibility Committee.

data.title: XMax Announces Strategic Expansion Into Artificial Intelligence to Drive Growth and Diversification
data.description: On March 24, 2026, XMax Inc. revealed plans to enter the artificial intelligence (“AI”) sector alongside its furniture business, approved by its Board of Directors. Trading as XWIN on NASDAQ, the Company aims to expand its operations to increase revenue sources and prepare for sustained growth, adapting to tough circumstances in the furniture market. This strategic move signals XMax's commitment to adapting to market changes with a long-term perspective.

data.title: Aqua New Jersey Awarded for Work to Eliminate PFAS from Drinking Water
data.description: Aqua New Jersey has been honored with the Leading Capital Construction Projects Award in New Jersey for its Hamilton Well 13 PFAS mitigation project. Presented by the New Jersey Alliance for Action, this award recognizes significant construction projects that contribute to the state's economy. The project involves implementing a PFAS treatment system at Hamilton Well 13, utilizing ion exchange technology to eliminate "forever chemicals" from drinking water. This initiative marks a significant milestone in safeguarding water quality and public health, demonstrating Aqua New Jersey’s commitment to innovation and environmental stewardship in addressing water contamination issues.

data.title: LSI Industries Completes Acquisition of Royston Group
data.description: Cincinnati-based LSI Industries Inc. (Nasdaq: LYTS) has successfully acquired Royston Group, a prominent player in providing identity and equipment solutions for retail settings, from Industrial Opportunity Partners. The acquisition follows the completion of standard closing requirements and the lapse of relevant regulatory approval timelines. LSI, a key manufacturer of commercial lighting and display products in the United States, finalized the acquisition to enhance its market presence further.

data.title: Perfect Corp. Showcases AI-Powered Beauty Agents and API Innovations Driving the Future of Retail at Shoptalk 2026
data.description: In New York, Perfect Corp. (NYSE: PERF) is presenting its advanced AI and AR solutions at Shoptalk 2026, happening from March 24-26, 2026, in Las Vegas at Mandalay Bay. These innovations set new standards for personalized shopping experiences, combining AI technologies for beauty, fashion, and retail sectors. The company is introducing its latest AI-driven shopping agents and developer-centric API solutions at Booth #1, revolutionizing the retail landscape with immersive experiences across both online and offline platforms.

data.title: Mountain Province Diamonds Announces Revised Details for Q4 and Full-Year 2025 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: Toronto and New York, March 24, 2026 - On March 24, 2026, Mountain Province Diamonds Inc. (TSX: MPVD) and (OTC: MPVD) disclosed updated information regarding its Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings release and conference call. The delay has impacted the announcement.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Zillow Group, Inc./
data.description: Zillow Group, Inc. will be showcasing its AI-native housing platform strategy at the AI Summit for Investors. This update was announced on 24-Mar-2026. Zillow Group will emphasize their innovative approach to utilizing artificial intelligence in the housing sector during the summit. The company aims to highlight the benefits of this strategy. The news was issued over PR Newswire.

data.title: OT Security Leaders Expose the "Minutes That Matter" Gap Attackers Are Exploiting
data.description: In a recent live webinar held in Irving, Texas on March 24, 2026, industrial leaders discussed the concerning issue of detection failure within organizations. It was highlighted that industrial organizations are increasingly at risk, as cyber threats often go unnoticed until it's too late. The webinar emphasized the need for proactive measures to prevent operational disruptions. The event shed light on the fact that simply detecting threats is not enough, and leaders must take decisive action to protect their organizations. This growing concern underscores the urgency for implementing comprehensive cybersecurity strategies.
